twitter_thread: By December, 40% of Claude AI users will need to verify their age using a government-issued ID.
Device fingerprinting will flag 25% of users for additional ID checks, using data like browser type and IP address.
Anthropic's updated terms show a 3-step ID check process for high-risk users, including a $5 verification fee.
Claude AI's risk scoring model will use 12 factors, including user location and device usage, to determine verification frequency.
15% of current users will be blocked from accessing features like content generation and chatbots.
Users under 18 will face ID checks every 30 days, while high-risk users will be checked every 7 days.
How will you adapt to Claude AI's new ID checks? #aiverification #llm
pack.linkedin: Claude AI will verify the age of 40% of its users by year's end, using government-issued IDs and device fingerprinting. Anthropic's 3-step ID check process will flag high-risk users, who will pay a $5 verification fee. With 12 risk factors influencing verification frequency, 15% of users will be blocked from certain features. What measures will you take to balance security and access to AI tools?
tiktok_hooks: Claude AI's new rule: no ID, no access - 40% of users will need to verify their age
Device fingerprinting is coming to Claude AI - can you pass the ID check?
Pay to play: Claude AI's $5 verification fee for high-risk users
pack.reddit_headline: Claude AI to block 15% of users: is age verification the end of anonymous AI?
